title: Deploy Enhanced Semantic Model & Build Power BI Visuals
description: ⏸️ PICK UP HERE: Deploy the 18-measure semantic model to Fabric workspace and build portfolio-quality Power BI visualizations. This task continues from 2025-11-17 session where 10 new DAX measures were added to _Measures.tmdl (total: 18 measures). Use MEASURE_GUIDE.md for visual design guidance.
acceptanceCriteria: Updated semantic model deployed to Fabric workspace (18 measures visible)
Semantic model refreshed successfully in Fabric
Power BI Desktop connected to updated semantic model
Page 1 created: Executive Dashboard (4 KPI cards + 4 charts per MEASURE_GUIDE.md)
Page 2 created: Risk & Sustainability Analysis (3 KPI cards + 4 charts per MEASURE_GUIDE.md)
notes: 🎯 START HERE: This is where the 2025-11-17 session ended
CONTEXT: 10 new DAX measures were added to _Measures.tmdl (Priority 1: 6 essential, Priority 2: 4 advanced)

New measures include: Total Quantity, Transaction Count, Supplier Countries Count, Materials Count, Avg Spend per Transaction, Latest EPI Score, Diversification Score, Top 3 Countries Spend %, Spend Exposure at Risk, Material Risk Index
MEASURE_GUIDE.md contains: schema overview, usage guide for all 18 measures, visual recommendations, page layouts, troubleshooting tips
IMPORTANT: Must deploy semantic model to Fabric BEFORE measures are available in Power BI Desktop
Deployment options: (A) Git sync to Fabric workspace, or (B) Manual update in Fabric portal
Once deployed: File → Get Data → Power BI semantic models → Select semantic_model_oeminsightbi
Report design spec already exists in /fabric/report.Report/PORTFOLIO_DESIGN.md from Task 013
This task focuses on TECHNICAL IMPLEMENTATION, Task 013 focused on DESIGN/PLANNING
deliverables: Deployed semantic model with 18 measures in Fabric workspace
Power BI report with 2 portfolio-quality pages (Executive Dashboard + Risk & Sustainability)
.pbix file (saved locally and optionally uploaded to Fabric)
High-resolution screenshots (1920x1080 PNG) for portfolio website
approach: Step 1: Deploy updated _Measures.tmdl to Fabric workspace (Git sync or manual)
Step 2: Refresh semantic model in Fabric to apply changes
Step 3: Open Power BI Desktop → Get Data → Connect to semantic model
Step 4: Verify all 18 measures appear in _Measures table (check display folders: Procurement, Sustainability, Risk)
Step 5: Build Page 1 - Executive Dashboard following MEASURE_GUIDE.md section 'Part 4: Visual Recommendations'
Step 6: Build Page 2 - Risk & Sustainability Analysis following MEASURE_GUIDE.md
Step 7: Apply professional theme (CY24SU10 already configured)
Step 8: Test all visuals (verify measures calculate correctly, slicers work)
Step 9: Export screenshots (File → Export → Export current page → PNG at 1920x1080)
Step 10: Export PDF (File → Export → Export to PDF)
Step 11: Save .pbix file locally and optionally publish to Fabric workspace

sessionContext.currentState: Measures created locally in _Measures.tmdl, MEASURE_GUIDE.md written, ready for deployment
sessionContext.nextAction: Deploy semantic model to Fabric workspace
keyResources: MEASURE_GUIDE.md - Complete usage guide for all 18 measures
_Measures.tmdl - Contains all 18 DAX measures (deploy this file)
PORTFOLIO_DESIGN.md - Design specifications for report layout
sessionContext.blockers: None - ready to proceed with deployment
